note: These are the outputs that MUST be true in a real production deployment. None are proven here — all values upstream are EMULATED placeholders.

outputs.requirement: HTTPS certificate chain validates to a trusted enterprise CA
outputs.expectedEvidence: Browser/openssl shows the leaf certificate for laf.example.local chaining to the enterprise CA with no trust or name-mismatch errors.
outputs.validationCommand: echo | openssl s_client -connect laf.example.local:443 -servername laf.example.local 2>/dev/null | openssl x509 -noout -issuer -subject -dates
outputs.passCriterion: Issuer = enterprise CA, subject/SAN includes laf.example.local, NotAfter in future, chain trusted.

outputs.requirement: Entra OIDC sign-in maps an authenticated user to a LocalAIFactory UserRole
outputs.expectedEvidence: Test user signs in via Entra and lands authenticated with the correct UserRole applied to authorization policies.
outputs.validationCommand: Sign in as a test user, then inspect the issued id_token roles claim and the effective UserRole in the app's session/diagnostics.
outputs.passCriterion: Entra app-role claim maps deterministically to the expected UserRole; unmapped users get least privilege.

outputs.requirement: SMTP test mail is delivered through the corporate relay
outputs.expectedEvidence: A test notification sent from no-reply@example.local arrives in a real mailbox with SPF/DKIM alignment.
outputs.validationCommand: Trigger the app's SMTP self-test action and inspect the received message headers.
outputs.passCriterion: Message delivered; SPF=pass and DKIM=pass; no relay rejection.

outputs.expectedEvidence: Service account establishes an SFTP session to sftp.example.local using the vault-held key with a pinned host key.
outputs.passCriterion: Key auth succeeds, host-key fingerprint matches the pinned value, directory listing returns.

outputs.requirement: SQL Server backup runs and restore is verified
outputs.expectedEvidence: Scheduled FULL + LOG backups complete and a test restore of the latest backup succeeds on a recovery instance.
outputs.validationCommand: RESTORE VERIFYONLY FROM DISK = N'\\backup\\laf\\latest.bak'; and a periodic full test-restore.
outputs.passCriterion: RESTORE VERIFYONLY reports the backup set is valid; periodic test restore brings the DB online with row counts matching.

outputs.requirement: Backup retention job runs and prunes per policy
outputs.expectedEvidence: Retention job log shows old backups removed and the configured retention window maintained.
outputs.validationCommand: Inspect the retention job history (SQL Agent / scheduled task) and the backup share contents against the policy window.
outputs.passCriterion: Backups older than the retention window are removed; the most recent N backups are retained intact.

outputs.requirement: Database migrations applied cleanly on the production instance
outputs.expectedEvidence: App startup applies all pending EF migrations with no error; __EFMigrationsHistory reflects the latest migration.
outputs.validationCommand: dotnet ef database update --project src/LocalAIFactory.Data --startup-project src/LocalAIFactory.Web (or app auto-migrate on startup)
outputs.passCriterion: All migrations present in __EFMigrationsHistory; 34-table schema intact; app starts.

outputs.requirement: Core pages load quickly in MSSQL-only mode
outputs.expectedEvidence: Home, Projects, Knowledge, Models all return HTTP 200 in well under one second with Qdrant/Ollama absent.
outputs.passCriterion: Every core page returns 200 quickly; no hang; degrades gracefully without optional services.

outputs.requirement: External penetration-test / security review report is clean
outputs.expectedEvidence: Independent firm's report shows zero open critical/high findings (or all remediated / risk-accepted).
outputs.validationCommand: Read the findings summary in the referenced report and verify remediation status of each critical/high item.
outputs.passCriterion: No open critical or high findings at go-live.

outputs.requirement: Monitoring alert fires on an induced failure
outputs.expectedEvidence: Inducing an error condition (e.g., DB unreachable) raises an alert through the operator's monitoring channel.
outputs.validationCommand: Stop the dependency in a test slot and confirm the alert is received within the SLO window.
outputs.passCriterion: Alert fires, is routed to the on-call channel, and auto-resolves when the condition clears.

outputs.expectedEvidence: A signed acceptance record references the passed acceptance criteria and a dated, authorised signature.
outputs.validationCommand: Verify the signed document, signer authority, date, and acceptance-criteria references.
outputs.passCriterion: Sign-off present, signed by an authorised signatory, referencing passed acceptance criteria.

outputs.requirement: Commercial license entitlement validates at runtime
outputs.expectedEvidence: The configured edition/entitlement matches the signed agreement and the license is not expired.
outputs.validationCommand: Inspect the runtime license state/diagnostics and compare entitlement claims and expiry to the agreement.
outputs.passCriterion: Edition and entitlements match the agreement; license valid and unexpired; enforcement mode as contracted.
